_meta.what: Whitney root inventory joined with the Talmud санскрита analytical overlay (Ряд/Тип/seṭ). Phase-3 enrichment crosswalk for the interactive companion to Zaliznyak. Ряд/Тип/seṭ are the author's own values from the manual (issue #50 ruling), not derived proposals.

provenance.whitney_fields: class, ppp, dcs_freq, dcs_rank, period_tags, mw_id, apte_id, warnemyr_url, section_refs, gloss — copied verbatim.
provenance.ryad: VERBATIM from the author's Приложение 1 where he catalogs the root (ryad_source='manual'); null otherwise. Un-indexed stays un-indexed.
provenance.tip: VERBATIM Тип (I/II/III/IV, Table 5) from Приложение 1 where present; null otherwise. tip_default='I' is the unmarked runtime behaviour.
provenance.set: VERBATIM seṭ/aniṭ/veṭ from Приложение 1 (set_source='manual'); set_code keeps the s/a/v1..v4 granularity (Table 8).
provenance.nominal_appendix2: Carried VERBATIM from the author's own Приложение 2 (source=tolchelnikov).
